mapper.select: SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, H.BIZ_NO, H.NAME, H.PHONE, H.ADDR, H.ADDR_DETAIL, H.DESCRIPTION, H.HOURS_JSON, H.TAG_LIST, H.LAT, H.LNG, H.RESV_INTERVAL_MIN AS resvIntervalMin, H.RESV_CAPACITY AS resvCapacity FROM TB_HOSPITAL H JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON H.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL ( HOSPITAL_ID, BIZ_NO, MEMBER_NO, NAME, PHONE, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL, APPROVE_DATE, STATUS_CD ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(HOSPITAL_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL), B.BIZ_NO, (SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = B.BIZ_ID OR EMAIL = B.BIZ_ID FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), B.BIZ_NAME, B.PHONE, B.ADDR, B.ADDR_DETAIL, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL H WHERE H.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HOSPITAL SET NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PHONE = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDR = #{addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDR_DETAIL = #{addrDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOURS_JSON = #{hoursJson, jdbcType=CLOB}, TAG_LIST = #{tagList, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAT = #{lat, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, LNG = #{lng, jdbcType=DOUBLE} WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
mapper.select:
SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, R.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, R.DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, R.END_TIME AS endTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, T.TYPE_NAME AS treatTypeName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = R.DOCTOR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE T ON T.TREAT_TYPE_ID = R.TREAT_TYPE_ID WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId})
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'DONE'
AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('CANCEL', 'REJECTED')
ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE DESC, R.RESV_TIME DESC, R.RESV_ID DESC

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, R.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, R.DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, R.END_TIME AS endTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, T.TYPE_NAME AS treatTypeName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = R.DOCTOR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE T ON T.TREAT_TYPE_ID = R.TREAT_TYPE_ID WHERE R.RESV_ID = #{resvId} AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL'

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.END_TIME AS endTime, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, T.TYPE_NAME AS treatTypeName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = R.DOCTOR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE T ON T.TREAT_TYPE_ID = R.TREAT_TYPE_ID WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'DONE') AND R.RESV_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND R.RESV_DATE < TO_DATE(#{toDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE, R.RESV_TIME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED' AND R.RESV_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND R.RESV_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_MEDICAL_RECORD MR WHERE MR.RESV_ID = R.RESV_ID ) ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE DESC, R.RESV_TIME DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(RECORD_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_MEDICAL_RECORD
INSERT INTO TB_MEDICAL_RECORD ( RECORD_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, RESV_ID, PET_ID, MEMBER_NO, VISIT_DATE, SYMPTOMS, DIAGNOSIS, PRESCRIPTION, MEMO, VET_NAME, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{hospitalId}, #{resvId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{petId}, #{memberNo}, #{visitDate}, #{symptoms, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diagnosis, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prescription, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{memo, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{vetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT MR.RECORD_ID AS recordId, MR.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, MR.RESV_ID AS resvId, MR.PET_ID AS petId, MR.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, MR.VISIT_DATE AS visitDate, MR.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, MR.DIAGNOSIS AS diagnosis, MR.PRESCRIPTION AS prescription, MR.MEMO AS memo, MR.VET_NAME AS vetName, MR.REG_DATE AS regDate, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName FROM TB_MEDICAL_RECORD MR JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = MR.PET_ID JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = MR.MEMBER_NO WHERE MR.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
AND ( UPPER(P.PET_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(M.MEMBER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND MR.VISIT_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -#{periodMonths})
ORDER BY MR.VISIT_DATE DESC, MR.RECORD_ID DESC

SELECT MR.RECORD_ID AS recordId, MR.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, MR.RESV_ID AS resvId, MR.PET_ID AS petId, MR.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, MR.VISIT_DATE AS visitDate, MR.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, MR.DIAGNOSIS AS diagnosis, MR.PRESCRIPTION AS prescription, MR.MEMO AS memo, MR.VET_NAME AS vetName, MR.REG_DATE AS regDate, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName FROM TB_MEDICAL_RECORD MR JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = MR.PET_ID JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = MR.MEMBER_NO WHERE MR.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND MR.RECORD_ID = #{recordId}

SELECT R.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.BIZ_REPLY AS bizReply, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies FROM TB_REVIEW R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_RESERVATION RV ON RV.RESV_ID = R.RESV_ID LEFT JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = RV.PET_ID WHERE R.REVIEW_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY R.REG_DATE DESC, R.REVIEW_ID DESC

SELECT R.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.BIZ_REPLY AS bizReply, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM TB_REVIEW R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO WHERE R.REVIEW_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = #{hospitalId} AND R.REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId}

SELECT TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999), TREAT_TYPE_ID

SELECT TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND TREAT_TYPE_ID = #{treatTypeId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(TREAT_TYPE_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE
INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE ( TREAT_TYPE_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, TYPE_NAME, DURATION_MIN, STATUS_CD, SORT_ORDR, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{treatTypeId}, #{hospitalId}, #{typeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{durationMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{statusCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y'), #{sortOrdr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, SPECIALTY AS specialty, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999), DOCTOR_ID

SELECT DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, SPECIALTY AS specialty, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(DOCTOR_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR
INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR ( DOCTOR_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, DOCTOR_NAME, SPECIALTY, STATUS_CD, SORT_ORDR, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{doctorId}, #{hospitalId}, #{doctorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialty, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{statusCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y'), #{sortOrdr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT E.EXC_ID AS excId, E.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, E.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, E.EXC_DATE AS excDate, TO_CHAR(E.EXC_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS excDateStr, E.EXC_TYPE AS excType, E.START_TIME AS startTime, E.END_TIME AS endTime, E.INTERVAL_MIN AS intervalMin, E.MEMO AS memo, E.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, E.REG_DATE AS regDate, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_EXCEPTION E LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = E.DOCTOR_ID AND D.HOSPITAL_ID = E.HOSPITAL_ID WHERE E.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
AND E.EXC_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND E.EXC_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY E.EXC_DATE, E.START_TIME, E.EXC_ID

SELECT E.EXC_ID AS excId, E.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, E.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, E.EXC_DATE AS excDate, TO_CHAR(E.EXC_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS excDateStr, E.EXC_TYPE AS excType, E.START_TIME AS startTime, E.END_TIME AS endTime, E.INTERVAL_MIN AS intervalMin, E.MEMO AS memo, E.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, E.REG_DATE AS regDate, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_EXCEPTION E LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = E.DOCTOR_ID AND D.HOSPITAL_ID = E.HOSPITAL_ID WHERE E.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND E.EXC_ID = #{excId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(EXC_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_EXCEPTION
INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_EXCEPTION ( EXC_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, DOCTOR_ID, EXC_DATE, EXC_TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, INTERVAL_MIN, MEMO, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{excId}, #{hospitalId}, #{doctorId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{excDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{excType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{intervalMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{statusCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y'), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_EXCEPTION SET DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, EXC_DATE = #{excDate, jdbcType=DATE}, EXC_TYPE = #{excType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME = #{startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_TIME = #{endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTERVAL_MIN = #{intervalMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MEMO = #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS_CD = #{statusCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND EXC_ID = #{excId}
